'''鈭歴-d-y-ch''' ('''kasadyechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:duppy|duppy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-d-y-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:duppy|duppy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-d-y-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kasadyechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisadyechoko|thisadyechoko]] || [[word:jisadyechoko|jisadyechoko]] || [[word:shisadyechoko|shisadyechoko]] || [[word:kisadyechoko|kisadyechoko]]
